text: I came down quite suddenly with a high fever, muscle aches all over, and a persistent dry cough. 8 day(s) and barely functioning, and it feels like it might be turning a corner. My temperature is really elevated.
label: influenza/moderate

text: Worsening chest cough with thick mucus, feverish, and quite short of breath. 4 day(s), and it seems to be escalating.
label: influenza/moderate

text: Coughing a lot, bringing up darker mucus, feverish, noticeably short of breath. 1 day(s).
label: pneumonia/mild

text: I'm extremely ill — high fever that won't break, severe muscle aches, bad dry cough, completely wiped out. 8 day(s) and getting worse, and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried. I have a very high fever.
label: influenza/moderate

text: I feel like something might be wrong — I can't put my finger on it.
label: non-infectious

text: Sharp pain in my chest when I breathe in, productive cough, fever. Worsened over 9 day(s). I'm burning up.
label: pneumonia/severe

text: Woke up feeling rough: chills, headache, that fluey feeling. About 3 day(s) in, and it seems to be escalating.
label: influenza/mild

text: Woke up feeling rough: chills, headache, that fluey feeling. About 8 day(s) in. I have a very high fever.
label: influenza/moderate

text: I came down quite suddenly with a high fever, muscle aches all over, and a persistent dry cough. 8 day(s) and barely functioning, though I think I'm slowly getting better. I have a very high fever.
label: influenza/moderate

text: Persistent cough with mucus and mild chest discomfort. Started 3 day(s) ago.
label: influenza/mild

text: I'm probably fine, but I've been feeling off and wanted to be sure.
label: non-infectious

text: Fever on and off, drenched in sweat, can't get out of bed. This has gone on 19 day(s), though I think I'm slowly getting better.
label: pneumonia/moderate
